input[type=\"search\"].font-family: Geist, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

kbd.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
